source_pr.title: expression, parser: fix issue #3691, cast compatibility
source_pr.body:
fix #3691, also fix #645

this pr will fail the jenkins, so should be merged together.

symptoms: // Merge Join will no longer enforce a sort. If a hint doesn't take effect, we will choose other types of join. (plan/dag_plan_test.go)
failure_signature: // Merge Join will no longer enforce a sort. If a hint doesn't take effect, we will choose other types of join. (plan/dag_plan_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR/patch looks like a correctness/refactor/feature change without a concrete flaky failure signature or a targeted stabilization for the picked test. Keep as insufficient evidence until CI logs or a reliable repro is available.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).

evidence: evidence: // Merge Join will no longer enforce a sort. If a hint doesn't take effect, we will choose other types of join. (plan/dag_plan_test.go)
